description: Default context recipe for autonomous AI agents (multi-turn agent runs). Lighter again than wizard recipes — agents typically have their own system prompt + skill catalog already injected, so the harness layer just adds user goal + recent history. v2 (2026-05-12): added mchatai-fundamentals autoload at priority 88 so agents see the platform-primitives catalog (dictionaries / palettes / etc.) without each agent's prompt enumerating them by hand.
